positive: A symmetrical and intricate celestial botanical pattern, featuring highly detailed, stylized Monstera leaves, exotic jungle florals, and crescent moon elements interwoven with constellations. The style should be a blend of elegant watercolor washes and precise, dark linework (reminiscent of engraved illustrations). Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep emerald green, sapphire blue, and muted gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated, designed as a seamless, vector-like graphic suitable for a high-end apparel print. Clean silhouette, bold contrast, intricate detail, mid-century modern botanical illustration style, ink drawing, highly detailed graphic design.
negative: blur, poorly drawn, cropped, text, signature, watermark, logo, excessive detail, messy, noisy, grain, low resolution, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, asymmetrical, cluttered, out of focus
